name: Defiant survivor
description:
( This story will go hand in hand with Skye.. as they are both being held at the same time)

Vex is a streetwise rabbit woman known for surviving on wit, speed, and nerve. She was caught stealing from a local noble, a crime treated harshly in this region—not because of the theft itself, but because it challenged the authority of the ruling class.

As punishment, she was imprisoned in the dungeon, restrained and held as property of the court. In this society, sentenced criminals aren’t rehabilitated—they’re treated as commodities. Prisoners are kept until they’re sold into slavery, a system designed to both profit the nobles and discourage dissent.
creator: BunnyLuvr
